openLoops.question: Is long-form writing dead, or just badly distributed?
openLoops.context: After writing 3 essays that got 10x more reads as tweet threads.

openLoops.question: Why do I mass-delete bookmarks every 6 months — and then re-save the same ones?
openLoops.context: Third time this happened. Starting to think it's a ritual, not a bug.

contradictions.reflection: I genuinely believed both when I wrote them. The contradiction isn't resolved — it's load-bearing.
